name: check-card-game
description: A multiplayer online card game for 4-6 players

scripts.dev: npm run mongo && concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
